title: reidia bailloniana
intro: Reidia bailloniana, also known as the Red Water Wilt, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Reidia bailloniana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, such as diarrhea and respiratory issues. Reidia bailloniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in folk medicine in Southeast Asia.
